subject: a cloaked figure crouched atop a stone gargoyle on a Gothic city rooftop
description: A cloaked humanoid figure crouches on a stone pedestal beside a large gargoyle, both perched high above a foggy Gothic city. The figure is small relative to the gargoyle, cloaked in dark fabric, leaning slightly forward in a watchful posture. The gargoyle itself is grey stone with visible wings, horns, and clawed limbs. The background is a misty cityscape of spires, arched windows, and lantern-lit buildings rendered in pale blue-grey twilight. A second smaller gargoyle is partially visible at the lower right edge. The mood is surveillance and concealment — a watcher in the fog.
foreground: cloaked figure crouched beside a stone gargoyle on a high rooftop pedestal
background: misty Gothic cityscape with spires and lantern light
